name: Dinosaur World 2
description: Basics about the creatures that once ruled the Earth.

questions.question: Which of these dinosaurs is often called the 'King of the Dinosaurs'?
Which modern animals are the closest living relatives of dinosaurs?
What do we call a dinosaur that only eats plants?
Which dinosaur is famous for having a large sail on its back?
How many legs did a Velociraptor walk on?
Which of these dinosaurs was heavily armored with a club-like tail?
In which period did the Tyrannosaurus Rex actually live?
Which dinosaur had a long, hollow crest on its head used to make sounds?
What was the most likely use for the Pachycephalosaurus thick skull?
Which dinosaur was one of the longest ever, reaching up to 27 meters?
